name: Sugar Cookie Ornaments
recipeIngredient: Assorted colored sugar crystals, cinnamon gems, nonpareils or decor
DUNCAN HINES Vanilla Layer Cake Frosting (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine cookie mix, contents of the buttery flavor packet from the Mix, egg, and milk. Stir until thoroughly blended. Form dough into 2-inch balls. Place on ungreased baking sheets about 3 inches apart. Grease and flour the bottom of a drinking glass. Press gently to flatten cookies into 2-inch circles.
3. Using the end of the drinking straw, press a hole through the center of each cookie. Decorate as desired or leave plain for frosting.
4. Bake at 375°F for 5-7 minutes or until set but not browned. Press another straw through the holes in the top of the cookies again. Cool on baking sheets for 1 minute before transferring to cooling racks. Allow to cool completely.
5. Frost plain cookies, if desired. String ribbon through the holes in the cookies and tie at the top.
Makes 3 1/2 to 4 dozen cookies.
Tip: Frosting can be divided and tinted with a few drops of red and green food coloring. Stir until well blended. Frost patterns on ornaments or frost and sprinkle with decor.
Painted Ornaments: Combine 1 egg yolk and 1 teaspoon water in separate custard cups. Tint each with 1 drop of different food coloring. Sketch designs on unbaked cookies using the top of a knife. Use clean watercolor paint brushes to paint designs on cookies before baking. Bake and cool as directed.
